core_mechanism: estimation of topological entropy (exponential growth rate of material line length / dynamical complexity) from the braiding of a set of point trajectories, via the braid-group / mapping-class action of tangled world-lines in a 2D domain
brief_reason: The abstract proposes using braid theory and the topology of surface mappings to approximate the topological entropy of a flow as a measure of how the trajectories entangle, converging to zero when they are not complexly entangled.
